full_description:
I need a self-contained, front-end JavaScript selector page that plugs straight into WordPress + Elementor. The goal is to let visitors build a lamp configuration by choosing key attributes—color, size, beam angle, and any future options we add—while the page instantly produces everything they need to see.

Here’s the full workflow I’m after:
• As soon as a visitor clicks an option, the script concatenates the choices into a unique part number and shows it in a read-only field with a “Copy to clipboard” icon. 
• The page then swaps in the matching product photo, dimension drawing, and technical description without any extra page loads. 
• A live HTML preview of the complete datasheet updates in real time right beside the selector. 
• Two action buttons sit under the preview: 
 – “View datasheet” opens the HTML preview full screen. 
 – “Download PDF” converts that same preview into a high-resolution PDF on the fly and starts the download. 

Technical constraints:
• Pure front-end solution only—no custom server, no external database, no PHP beyond what WordPress already delivers. 
• Must work inside Elementor; I’ll drop the compiled JS/CSS into an HTML widget. 
• Code should be clean, well commented, and structured so my team can add or swap lamp models, images, and text later by editing simple JSON, CSV, or static files—no coding required. 

Deliverables:
1. Responsive selector page (HTML, CSS, JS) ready to embed. 
2. Utility script for part-number generation and clipboard copy. 
3. Dynamic asset-loading functions for images, drawings, and text. 
4. Client-side PDF export logic that preserves layout and resolution. 
5. Brief setup guide showing how to register new product variants. 

If you’ve built interactive spec tools, configurators, or dynamic PDF generators before, I’d love to see examples. Clean execution and future maintainability are my top priorities.

Project Title
Development of a Bilingual Maintenance Marketplace Platform (Website + Mobile Apps iOS & Android + Admin Portal)

Project Overview
I am seeking an experienced software development team or full-stack developer to build a bilingual (English/Arabic) digital marketplace platform that connects customers with verified maintenance service providers in City, Country (details will be shared with the shortlisted team).

The platform will allow customers to post maintenance requests free of charge and receive quotations from approved service providers operating within their respective districts.
Service providers can only join the platform after their documents have been reviewed and approved by the system administrator.

Scope of Work
1. Customer Features
• User registration and login (Email, Mobile OTP, Social Login optional)
• Bilingual interface (Arabic & English)
• Create and manage maintenance requests
• Select service category and district/location within City.
• Upload images related to maintenance issues
• Receive multiple quotations from service providers
• Receive WhatsApp notification for all quotations received
• Compare quotations and choose a provider
• In-app and push notifications
• Request history and status tracking
• User profile management
• Ratings and reviews for service providers
• Check complete history of their all requests

2. Service Provider Features
• Registration and profile creation (Email, Mobile OTP, Social Login optional)
• Upload company/legal documents for verification
• Admin approval workflow before activation
• Service categories management
• Districts (max. 5) selection within City
• Create request to add additional districts for admin approval
• View available customer requests from their selected Districts.
• Submit quotations to customers
• Manage quotations and job status
• Receive WhatsApp notifications for each job posted within their selected Districts
• Profile and portfolio management
• Ratings and reviews management
• Check complete history of all their completed requests including monthly earnings etc.

3. Admin Portal Features
• Secure admin authentication
• Dashboard with analytics and statistics
• Approve/reject service provider registrations
• Approve/reject service provider additional district requests
• Review uploaded documents
• Manage customers and providers
• Manage service categories and Riyadh districts
• Monitor requests and quotations
• Content management (CMS)
• Manage ratings, reviews, and complaints
• Notification management
• Reports and data export

Platforms Required
1. Responsive Website (English & Arabic)
2. Mobile App for Customers (iOS & Android)
3. Mobile App for Service Providers (iOS & Android)
4. Web-based Admin Portal

Technical Requirements
Preferred Technology Stack
• Frontend Website: React.js / [login to view URL]
• Mobile Apps: Flutter or React Native (single codebase)
• Backend: Node.js or Laravel
• Database: PostgreSQL or MySQL
• Notifications: Push Notifications + WhatsApp API integration
• Hosting: Cloud infrastructure with full Arabic language support

Additional Requirements
• Fully responsive UI/UX
• RTL (Right-to-Left) support for Arabic language
• Secure and scalable architecture
• Clean and documented source code
• API documentation
• Multi-language support (English/Arabic)
• SEO-friendly website architecture
• Performance optimization
• Deployment assistance

Deliverables
• Complete source code for website, mobile apps, and admin portal
• UI/UX designs (if included)
• Database schema and documentation
• API documentation
• Deployment on production server
• Bug fixing and post-launch support period

Preferred Experience
Please apply only if you have:
• Previous experience developing marketplace/service platforms
• Experience with bilingual Arabic/English applications
• Strong portfolio in React/Flutter/Node.js/Laravel development
• Experience implementing admin approval workflows and notification systems

Please share:
1. Similar projects completed.
2. Proposed technology stack.
3. Estimated timeline.
4. Total project cost.
5. Team composition and availability.

full_description:
I am developing a new line of home-fragrance products and need a chemist who can take charge of both the perfume concentrates and the reed-diffuser base. Your main focus will be formulation development and ingredient sourcing, ensuring every blend delivers a long-lasting aroma with distinctive, memorable scent profiles that set my brand apart.

Here is what I expect from our collaboration: 
• Two finished, production-ready formulations (one perfume oil concentrate, one diffuser blend) that meet IFRA guidelines. 
• A documented bill of materials with reliable suppliers for each raw ingredient, including minimum order quantities and lead times. 
• Stability and performance notes covering longevity, evaporation rate, and scent throw in typical Indian climatic conditions.

I’m open to exploring natural isolates, aroma chemicals, or a creative mix of both—whichever route best achieves the desired longevity and signature character. If you have access to GC-MS, that is a plus, but meticulous nose work and clear documentation are even more important.

Let me know your relevant lab experience, preferred creation process, and the first steps you would take once we start.

full_description:
I’m a professional singer with bookings coming in every week, and I no longer have the bandwidth to juggle incoming calls and the detailed coordination that a live performance demands. I need a single, dependable point of contact who can:

• Answer every phone call that comes to my dedicated artist line in a warm, professional tone. 
• Provide accurate information to callers—everything from my basic performance packages and available dates to travel requirements—so each enquiry feels taken care of right away. 
• Keep a brief call log in Google Sheets (or a similar shared doc) so I can see at a glance who rang, what they needed, and any follow-up actions you’ve scheduled. 
• Liaise with me—usually via WhatsApp or email—so I remain updated but not overwhelmed. 
• Help me pull together the on-ground details for my next event: consolidate key timings, confirm the people I need to greet on arrival, and make sure everything is in one clear run-sheet before the show.

Success for me looks like this: no missed calls, every enquiry answered with accurate information within normal business hours, and a concise event brief in my inbox a week before show day.

If you’re organised, confident on the phone, and comfortable working remotely across basic cloud tools, let’s talk.

full_description:
I need a qualified inspector who can carry out a thorough, on-site examination of several pieces of industrial electrical equipment—specifically transformers, switchgears, and panels. The inspection should confirm that each unit is built and assembled to specification, operating correctly, and ready for safe commissioning in our facility.

Scope of work
• Conduct a visual and functional inspection of every transformer, switchgear, and panel on the list I will supply before your visit. 
• Verify nameplate data, wiring integrity, insulation condition, and all accessible mechanical connections. 
• Document any deviations from the drawings or data sheets. 
• Capture clear photographs of identification plates, internal compartments, protective devices, and any observed non-conformities. 
• Provide a concise inspection report for each asset, noting pass/fail status, observations, and recommendations for corrective action if needed.

Logistics
I will arrange site access and coordinate with plant personnel so you can work without delay. Most equipment is already installed but de-energised; lock-out/tag-out procedures will be in place.

Deliverables
1. Individual PDF reports for every transformer, switchgear, and panel inspected. 
2. A summary spreadsheet highlighting overall findings. 
3. Image folder organised by asset number.

Acceptance criteria
• Reports must reference the serial or asset tag shown in accompanying photos. 
• All findings should be evidence-based, with no undocumented opinions. 
• Delivery of the full inspection package within three business days of the site visit.

If you have proven experience inspecting medium-voltage and low-voltage industrial equipment and can meet the timeline above, I look forward to working with you.

Inspection shall be done as per Quality Assurance Plan & relevant IS standards.

full_description:
I need clear, head-mounted footage that will teach humanoid robots how real people handle everyday and technical work. If you already own a 1080p phone or a GoPro, and a head strap or cap mount, you can begin right away, shooting in at least 1080p with steady, well-lit framing.

The workflow is simple. Whenever you cook dinner, fold laundry, clean the house, assemble electronics, solder a joint, or fix an appliance, slip on the mount and capture the task from your point of view. Each clip should focus on one activity; no narration or fancy editing is necessary—just authentic, uninterrupted action. After recording, upload the raw files to the link I’ll provide, and I’ll review, label, and approve them for payment.

I’ll send you a brief onboarding guide covering camera angle, safety, and file naming so our review stays fast and consistent. Payment is issued per accepted clip, and there’s plenty of follow-up work once we see that your footage meets the quality bar.

Confirm you’re ready and I’ll forward the starter task list together with the upload credentials so you can begin filming right away.

full_description:
## Healing Out Loud Animated Lesson Series (Pilot Project)

I am developing a mental wellness app called **Healing Out Loud**, designed to help people better understand themselves through attachment theory, emotional awareness, nervous system education, and personal growth.

After completing an attachment style assessment, users are guided through a series of short educational lessons (approximately 60–90 seconds each) tailored to their attachment style.

I'm looking for an animator who can help bring these lessons to life through engaging motion graphics and visual storytelling.

### The Style I'm Looking For

I am **not** looking for a traditional corporate explainer video or whiteboard animation.

Instead, I'm looking for a clean, modern, premium wellness aesthetic similar to apps like Headspace or Calm.

The videos should rely on symbolic visuals and motion graphics rather than a presenter speaking to the camera.

Examples of visuals include:

* Text messages appearing and disappearing
* Email notifications
* Child silhouettes
* Thought bubbles
* Abstract emotional concepts
* Journals
* Warm lighting
* Simple transitions
* Clean, calming animation

When people, hands, or silhouettes are shown, I would like diverse representation, particularly Black and Brown individuals.

### Pilot Project

The first lesson is called:

**Anxious Attachment: Awareness Comes First**

The goal is to help users understand:

* How anxious attachment develops
* How it shows up in everyday life
* Why awareness is the first step toward healing

I will provide:

* Complete script
* Creative direction
* Brand colors
* Feedback throughout the process

### Potential for Ongoing Work

This pilot is intended to evaluate style and fit. If successful, this project has the potential to expand into an entire lesson library consisting of multiple videos for different attachment styles and emotional wellness topics.

Please include:

* Relevant portfolio
* Cost for a 60–90 second animated lesson (need 4 total)
* Estimated turnaround time
* Whether voiceover integration is included

My baby-product site needs a thorough technical tune-up so it can rank and convert better. I want every broken link fixed or redirected, noticeably faster load times, and a layout that responds perfectly on any device. 

Beyond those essentials, I’d like help reorganising the content flow and overall layout design to make information easier for both shoppers and search engines to reach. Navigation labels, internal linking and page hierarchy should all feel intuitive once you’re done. 

On the performance side, please tackle page-speed bottlenecks and implement solid browser-caching rules. Compress assets, optimise images, strip code bloat—whatever it takes to push Google PageSpeed scores well into the green. If you can shave time off server response as part of this, that’s a plus. 

All these fixes feed directly into stronger organic visibility, so practical on-page SEO knowledge and broader digital-marketing experience are essential. Insight into the baby-products niche will give you an advantage when suggesting keyword targets or campaign ideas, but it isn’t mandatory. 

Deliverables 
• All broken links repaired with zero crawl errors 
• Fully responsive design verified on major device sizes 
• Page-speed score of 90+ on Google PageSpeed Insights 
• Browser-caching and related front-end optimisations deployed 
• Updated layout and content-organisation plan implemented 
• One-page summary of changes and future digital-marketing opportunities 

Let me know which tech stack you specialise in, your testing process, and an example of a project where you achieved similar SEO and performance gains.

full_description:
I am looking for an experienced Chemical Engineer, Process Chemist, Industrial Chemist, or Laboratory R&D Expert based in India to develop and manufacture Trimethyl Citrate through the esterification of citric acid.

Project Requirements
Synthesize Trimethyl Citrate using a suitable citric acid esterification process.
Achieve a target yield of approximately 500g of finished product.

Product quality should meet the following specifications:
Purity: 95% or higher if you cannot check it's purity it should pass below test.
Clean-burning characteristics:
Burns with a pale blue or bluish flame.
No visible soot or smoke formation.
No noticeable odor during burning.
No yellow coloration in the flame under normal test conditions.
Yield trimethyl citrate must be in crystal or powder dry form.

Documentation Requirements
The selected expert must provide:
Clear photos and videos of the synthesis process.
Photos and videos of the final product.
Photos/videos of any burn tests performed.
Details of the production method, equipment used, and observations during the process.

Delivery Requirements
The complete batch (approximately 500g yield) must be delivered after successful production.
Proper packaging and safe handling procedures should be followed during shipment.

Preferred Candidate
Based in India.
Background in Chemical Engineering, Industrial Chemistry, Process Development, Organic Synthesis, Applied Chemistry, or Laboratory Research & Development.
Prior experience with esterification reactions, specialty chemicals, organic synthesis, process scale-up, and quality testing is highly preferred.
Proposal Information

Please include:
Your qualifications and relevant experience.
Previous projects involving esterification or citrate-based compounds.
Available laboratory/production facilities.

Here’s what I need from you:

full_description:
MANDATORY VETTING:
I apologize for this extra step, but due to the massive amount of AI-generated bot responses on this platform, I need to verify that you are a human who actually understands MetaHuman rigging.

To be considered for this contract, please start your proposal with the answer to this technical question: In the standard UE5 MetaHuman skeleton, what is the exact name of the parent bone that the left and right thigh bones (thigh_l and thigh_r) connect to?
(Proposals that do not start with the correct bone name will be immediately deleted without being read).

The Task:
I am providing two broken MetaHuman clothing assets (Female Pantyhose and Female Stockings) that are currently clipping and failing to deform correctly at the joints (specifically the knees and hips).

The original asset creator noted in their documentation that manual binding is required for perfect deformation. Your job is to repair these assets by performing a clean weight transfer from the standard Female MetaHuman base body to both clothing meshes, so they function seamlessly as true, plug-and-play MetaHuman assets.

Technical Requirements:

Target Body Proportions: The primary rigging and weight transfer must be based on the Average Height / Average Weight female body (f_med_nrw). The rigging must be robust enough that the garments scale cleanly to the Average Height / Underweight (f_med_unw), Tall Height / Average Weight (f_tal_nrw), and Tall Height / Underweight (f_tal_unw) proportions without tearing.

Full Hierarchy Transfer: Weights must be transferred accurately across the entire lower skeletal chain (hips, thighs, knees, calves, ankles, feet) to prevent any mesh tearing during range-of-motion.

Mesh Variations: The provided .uasset files may include style variations (e.g., stockings for flat feet vs. high heels). The corrected weights must be applied to the specific base meshes provided.

UV Maps & Material Slots (CRITICAL): These assets utilize highly complex, parameterized Material Instances. You are strictly repairing the vertex weights. Do not alter the existing UV maps or material slots in any way, as this will break the existing texture overlays and color parameters.

Deliverables & Payment Approval:

Milestone 1 (Visual QA): Before delivering the final files, you must provide a brief screen recording demonstrating the repaired meshes applied to the f_med_nrw and f_tal_unw bodies. The video must show the character performing both a standard walk cycle and a deep crouch animation to prove the knee and hip deformations are clean.

Milestone 2 (File Delivery): Once the video is approved, you will deliver a complete UE5 project folder (or fully configured .uasset files).

Note: The project milestone will only be released after the provided files are successfully tested in my local UE5.7 pipeline to verify material integrity and deformation.

full_description:
DCP Global is recruiting a freelance translator for ongoing translation tasks through our agency platform at OneForma. Work is available now and distributed through the platform on a flexible, self-paced basis.

LANGUAGE PAIR
English -> German

WHAT YOU'LL DO

Translate text content from English into German following project style guidelines. All tasks are completed through the OneForma platform. Work is ongoing and available immediately upon onboarding.

PAY RATE
$0.05 per hit (USD)

PAYMENT TERMS

All hits completed during the billing cycle are totalled and paid in a single lump sum. The billing cycle runs from the 20th of each month to the 19th of the following month. Payment is issued in the middle of the month after the cycle closes.

Example: Work completed between June 20 and July 19 is paid in mid-August.

REQUIREMENTS

-Native speaker of German
-Strong written accuracy and cultural fluency in the target language
-Must register with DCP Global's agency on OneForma before starting
-Must pass a short language proficiency test upon registration
-Reliable internet connection
-Able to work independently and meet task deadlines

HOW TO APPLY

Place your bid with a short note covering:

-Your native language and fluency level
-Any relevant translation experience
-Confirmation you are available to start immediately

Only qualified applicants will be contacted with registration and onboarding instructions

cleaned_text: تصميم فيلا بنمط نيوكلاسيك عصري الالتزام بكود البناء السعودي ابحث معماري محترف لتصميم فيلا خاصه علي ارض مساحتها 740.96 متر مربع المملكه العربيه السعوديه الارض تقع علي زاويه بواجهتين علي شارعين عرض 30 متر و15 متر ومجاوره لحديقه عامه pdfنطاق العمل النمط المعماري نيوكلاسيك عصري modern neoclassic ابحث مظهر انيق وخالد، بخطوط نظيفه، وتناسق الابعاد، تفاصيل دقيقه وغير متكلفه.مراحل التصميم المخططات الاوليه توزيع المساقط الافقيه للفيلا ارضي اول ملحق علوي التصور ثلاثي الابعاد 3d تصاميم خارجيه وداخليه عاليه الجوده تبرز جماليه النيوكلاسيك وتناغم الفيلا الموقع.التفاعل الموقع يجب ان يستغل التصميم بفاعليه الواجهه المطله علي شارع ال 30 متر والحديقه المجاوره لضمان افضل اطلاله وخصوصيه المخططات التنفيذيه ملفات cad bim نهاييه مطابقه تماما كود البناء السعودي sbc التفاصيل الانشاييه والمعماريه اوتوكاد تصميم مخططات معماريه تصميم معماري تصميم هندسي استشارات هندسيه unknown
full_description: أبحث عن معماري محترف لتصميم فيلا خاصة على أرض مساحتها 740.96 متر مربع في المملكة العربية السعودية. الأرض تقع على زاوية بواجهتين على شارعين (عرض 30 متر و15 متر) ومجاورة لحديقة عامة. PDFنطاق العمل:النمط المعماري: نيوكلاسيك عصري (Modern Neoclassic). أبحث عن مظهر أنيق وخالد، بخطوط نظيفة، وتناسق في الأبعاد، مع تفاصيل دقيقة وغير متكلفة.مراحل التصميم:المخططات الأولية: توزيع المساقط الأفقية للفيلا (أرضي + أول + ملحق علوي).التصور ثلاثي الأبعاد (3D): تصاميم خارجية وداخلية عالية الجودة تبرز جمالية النيوكلاسيك وتناغم الفيلا مع الموقع.التفاعل مع الموقع: يجب أن يستغل التصميم بفاعلية الواجهة المطلة على شارع الـ 30 متر والحديقة المجاورة لضمان أفضل إطلالة وخصوصية. المخططات التنفيذية: ملفات (CAD/BIM) نهائية مطابقة تماماً لـ كود البناء السعودي (SBC)، بما في ذلك التفاصيل الإنشائية والمعمارية.
